==Translingual==
{{stroke order|strokes=11}}
{{stroke order|type=jbw|strokes=11}}
{{ja-forms|望|望|望}}

===Alternative forms===
Note that in simplified Chinese and Vietnamese scripts, [[亡]] is written with an upward hook. In Hong Kong and Taiwan (traditional Chinese script), [[月]] is written like [[夕]] with an extra slash below while [[王]] is written as [[𡈼]]. In Mainland China, Japan, Korea, Vietnam, the bottom component is written [[王]]. Note that the standard [[Kangxi]] form is written ⿱⿰亡月𡈼.

==Chinese==
{{zh-forms|alt=朢,𣈂,𦣠,𪤀,𥩿,𣍢,𥪛,𢾘,𭱗}}

===Glyph origin===
{{Han etym}}
Originally written {{zh-l|*𦣠}}, an {{Han compound|臣|𡈼|ls=ic|t1=eye|t2=person standing on the ground|nocap=y}} – a person standing up and looking off into the distance. Later {{zh-l|*月|moon}} was added to produce {{zh-l|*朢}}.

The {{zh-l|*臣}} component is now written {{zh-l|*亡}}, making the current form a {{Han compound|亡|月|𡈼|ls=psc|c1=p|c2=s|c3=s|t2=|t3=|nocap=y}}.

===Etymology===
From {{inh-lite|zh|sit-pro|*mV-taŋ||to see}}. Cognate with {{cog-lite|my|sc=Mymr|မြင်|tr=mrang}}.

===Definitions===
{{head|zh|hanzi}}

# to [[see]]; to [[watch]] {{q|especially from a [[distance]]}}
#: {{zh-x|眺望|'''to watch''' from a vantage point|tr=tiào'''wàng'''}}
#* {{zh-x|吾 視 其 轍 亂，望 其 旗 靡，故 逐 之。|Having seen the disorderly tracks they left behind and '''espied''' their low-hanging banners afar, I gave the order to pursue them.|ref=Zuozhuan.}}
#* {{zh-x|望 之 不 似 人君。|When I '''looked at''' him – even '''from a distance''' – I could not find a leader there.|ref=Mencius}}
# {{lb|zh|chiefly|dialectal}} to [[look]]; to [[look at]]
#: {{zh-x|東張西望|to look around}}
#: {{zh-x|我 望 嚟 望 去 都 望 唔 到{dou3-2} 喎{wo3}！|I kept '''looking''' but I still can't '''see''' it!|C}}
#: {{zh-x|望 下{haa5} 嗰度！|'''Look''' over there!|C}}
#: {{zh-x|望 左|'''look''' left ''(found on roads in Hong Kong)''|C|tr='''mong6''' zo2}}
#* {{zh-x|含 住 個 雞包仔　望 住 四寶雞扎|With a chicken bun in my mouth, staring at the four-treasure chicken roll|C|ref='''2001''', {{lw|zh|謝立文}} ({{w|Brian Tse}}), {{lang-lite|zh|sc=Hani|麥兜與雞}} (theme song of ''{{w|My Life as McDull}}'')}}
# to [[gaze]] at; to [[stare]] at
#* {{zh-x|舉-頭 望 明月，低頭 思 故鄉。|I raise my head to '''gaze''' at the bright moon and bow my head to think of my hometown.|CL|ref='''Tang Dynasty''', {{lw|zh|李白}} ({{w|Li Bai}}), {{lw|zh|靜夜思}} ("{{w|Quiet Night Thought}}")}}
# {{lb|zh|figurative}} to [[observe]]; to [[watch]]
#: {{zh-x|觀望|'''to observe''' without taking action}}
# to [[hope]]; to [[expect]]
#: {{zh-x|希望|to hope; to wish; to desire}}
#: {{zh-x|願望|wish; desire}}
# [[fame]]; [[reputation]]
#: {{zh-x|名望|fame}}
#: {{zh-x|威望|prestige}}
# [[location]]; [[locality]]
#: {{zh-x|郡望|ancestral home; place of origin {{q|of one's [[lineage]]}}}}
#: {{zh-x|地望|geographical location; geography}}
# {{lb|zh|Chinese astronomy}} the day or night of the [[full moon]]
#: {{zh-x|朔望月|synodic month}}
# {{lb|zh|Mandarin|Wu}} [[towards]]
#: {{zh-alt-inline|往|tr=-}}
#: {{zh-x|'''望''' 前頭 跑|tr=sh:6maon&6zhi deu6&6bau|Run (towards) forward.|SH}}

====Usage notes====
The preposition "towards" is commonly written as {{zh-l|往*}} in Mandarin. Sometimes written as {{zh-l|往*}} for Wu usage.

{{zh-dial|看}}
